summary: Backend-only Task 4 verification completed for Episode Builder determinism and validity constraints; all executed tests passed.
action_items: No functional fixes required for Task 4.
Optional: add a negative builder test for impossible ratio band producing no valid middle switch_step candidates.
critical_code_review_comments: Episode-level seed derivation is deterministic and tied to both base seed and episode_id via SHA-256 digest.
Builder returns EpisodeSpec directly (no validation bypass) and keeps shifts non-zero and distinct.
Switch-step candidate generation enforces middle-band bounds and excludes first/last positions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expanded Episode Builder coverage with 3 additional tests (alphabet uniqueness/size, deterministic episode_id-based seed variance, strict ratio-band switch step). Full suite now passes 20/20 under pytest.
rca of the issue: No issue reproduced. All requested Task 4 constraints validated. NO MOCKED APIs used.
